Settings
Configure your launcher
Microsoft Accounts
No Microsoft accounts. Add one to play online with your real username and skin.
Game
Game Directory
~/.justice-launcher
Offline Username
Used when not signed into Microsoft
Show Snapshots
Include snapshot versions in list
Keep Launcher Open
Don't close launcher when game starts
Justice Theme OPTIONAL
Applies a black & purple resource pack to your game.
Changes buttons, menus and the title screen background.
Off — vanilla menus will be used
Power Tools
JVM Flags
Extra Java arguments appended at launch. Leave blank for defaults. Example: -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=50
Performance Presets
Install Sodium, Iris, Lithium and more with one click. Requires a Fabric instance.
Crash Analyzer
Scan the latest game logs for known crash patterns and get fix suggestions.
Export / Import Instance
Share or back up an entire instance — mods, shaders, worlds, configs — as a single zip file.
About
Justice Client
Version 2.0.6
Built with
Electron · Mojang API · Fabric Meta API
Justice Account
Logged in
your@justiceclient.org
Two-Factor Authentication
Adds extra security to your account (optional)
Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
Or enter key manually:
Enter your authenticator code to disable 2FA
Themes
Personalize your launcher with a custom background and accent color
Background Image
No image set
Stored locally on your device. PNG/JPG, ideally 1920x1080+.
Accent Color
Click-drag the square and hue bar, or type a hex
Quick Swatches
Saved Presets
Save your current look so you can swap back to it later
Extras
Extra visual touches and sharing
Share codes bundle your accent color, JVM flags, and RAM. Background images aren't included, to keep codes short.
Usage Dashboard
Your launcher activity at a glance
Launches – Last 7 Days
Per-Instance Stats
Wrong Java Version Detected
You have an old Java installed that won't work.
Justice Client detected Java ? at:
Minecraft needs Java 17 or newer. Please uninstall this older Java, then click Launch again — Justice Client will automatically download and install Java 21 for you.
How to uninstall Java:
ESC

My Skin
Upload a custom PNG skin (64×64 or 64×32)
Drop your skin PNG here
or browse files · 64×64 or 64×32 PNG
New Skin Preview
skin.png
—

My Skin Collection

No saved skins yet. Upload a skin and click "Save Current" to start your collection!
Tips
• Skin must be a PNG file, either 64×64 (modern) or 64×32 (legacy)
• Classic arms are 4px wide · Slim arms are 3px wide
• Skin changes apply to your Microsoft account immediately
• You'll see it in-game after relaunching

Theme
Switch between dark and light mode
Navigation layout
Use a left sidebar or a top bar for navigation
UI Sounds
Play subtle sound effects for UI interactions
Notification Sound
Sound played when receiving a chat message
Desktop Notifications
Show system notifications when launcher is minimized
Sign in with Microsoft
Opens your browser to sign into your
Microsoft / Xbox account securely.
Auth tokens expire after 24 hours. You'll need to re-add this account when it expires. Use Microsoft login for a persistent session.
Minecraft Access Token
Your Minecraft bearer token. Get it from msauthtoken.github.io or extract from another launcher's session files.
UUID (optional — auto-detected from token)
Name this version
Give this install a custom name so you can find it easily.
Display Name
Folder ID: —

Launcher Theme

Color Mode
Dark is cleaner for long sessions; light is easier in bright rooms.
Settings
All launcher options, grouped by topic.
Interface Performance Java Launch Window Notifications Discord Folders Updates About

Interface

Interface Mode
Advanced is the full experience. Simple is the clean layout you're in right now.
Accent Color
Applies across both Simple and Advanced.

Performance

Memory (RAM)
How much RAM to give Minecraft. 4–6 GB works for most players.
4 GB
Auto-tune RAM
Set a safe value based on your system memory.
Resolution
Default window size — overridable per launch.
×

Java

Java Arguments
Extra flags appended at launch. Leave blank for sensible defaults.
Java Installation
Check that Java is set up. JDK 25 auto-installs for 26.x+.

Launch Behavior

Close launcher on launch
Hide the launcher window when Minecraft starts.
Keep launcher open
Keep the launcher open in the tray while playing.
Auto-join last server
When launching a version you played on a server, re-connect automatically.

Window

Animated background
Subtle particle motion on the launcher. Turn off to save CPU.
Start minimized
Launcher starts in the tray on Windows/macOS.

Notifications

Native notifications
Show OS notifications for install finish, crashes, friends, etc.
Sound on launch
Play a chime when Minecraft finishes loading.

Discord

Rich Presence
Show "Playing Minecraft — Fabric 1.20" on your Discord profile.
Show version
Include the version ID in the presence text.

Folders

Launcher Root
installs live here
Current Instance
selected version
Logs
crash reports & stdout

Updates

Auto-check
Check for launcher updates on startup.
Check now
Manually poll for a newer launcher version.

About

Justice Client
v1.0 • Electron — • Node —
Justice Client
What’s happening
Latest update
v1.0

Cleaner layout. Simple UI puts the character front and centre, with accounts and the version picker parked in the top-right.

JDK 25, handled. Anything running Minecraft 26.x or newer grabs JDK 25 on first launch — no manual setup.

Modrinth in one click. Search, filter and install mods straight from the Mods tab.

At a glance
Playtime—
Last version—
Installed0
Mods0
Did you know?

You can drag a .jar file anywhere in the window to install it — no need to open the Mods tab first.

Saved
